title: Sketch to Photoreal Render
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for converting architectural pencil sketches into photoreal renders while preserving horizon, proportions, window placement, and real-world plausibility.

en.title: Sketch to Photoreal Render
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for converting architectural pencil sketches into photoreal renders while preserving horizon, proportions, window placement, and real-world plausibility.

zh-CN.title: 草图 → 写实一键渲染
zh-CN.description: 测试将建筑铅笔草图转为照片级效果图时,能否保持地平线、比例、窗户位置和真实世界合理性。
